heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the methods or types discussed in this
usage example, see the following API Documentation:

- [TransactionOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/TransactionOptions.html)

- [ClientSession](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html)

- [startSession()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html#startSession)

- [startTransaction()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#startTransaction)

- [commitTransaction()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#commitTransaction)

- [abortTransaction()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#abortTransaction)

- [endSession()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html#endSession)
